creator: ashish@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi

I have ejabberd 24.06 packaged in my private ports repository[0], but it's problem with rc.d script, as it fails to start with ejabberdctl (sudo -u ejabberd -H ejabberdctl start).

You can give it a shot, if you like.

References:
[0] https://git.sr.ht/~abbe/freebsd-ports/tree/new-master/item/net-im/ejabberd
